title: The Taris Holofeed: Prime Edition
content:
{{Top|rwm|old}}
'''The Taris Holofeed: Prime Edition''' was a one-page article included in the ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic/Rebellion flip-book]]''. It was an in-universe issue of the [[Taris Holofeed]] from sometime before the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Commencement|''Commencement'']] arc.

==Contents==
*''Stalemate on Suurja continues''
*''Patrol redoubles hunt for Zovius Mendu''
*''Investors sought in fishing expedition''
*''Taris pins hopes on new Jedi class''
